Description: Structural Engineer — mezzanine framing design and detailing (analysis; member sizing; connection design; drawing production; IFC stamping)
Notes: Core engineering effort: load analysis, member sizing, connection design, drawing production, P.Eng. stamp. Per Level_of_Effort.csv R-14.

Description: BIM Technician — mezzanine framing drawing production and modelling
Notes: 3D modelling, sheet setup, detail drafting, coordination. Per Level_of_Effort.csv R-13.

Description: Project Manager — coordination and oversight for mezzanine framing deliverable
Notes: PM coordination: pre-design decisions, Owner interface, IFC release oversight. Per Level_of_Effort.csv R-01.

Description: Cost Estimator — quantity takeoff and benchmarking support for mezzanine
Notes: Quantity takeoff support, cost benchmarking for mezzanine system selection. Per Level_of_Effort.csv R-08.

Description: Internal QA review of mezzanine drawing set (senior structural engineer review)
Notes: Independent senior review of all member sizes, connections, code compliance, cross-references. Priced as parametric allowance.

Description: Multi-discipline coordination review (Arch/Mech/Plumb/Elec) for mezzanine penetrations and clearances
Notes: Coordination with PKG-001 (Arch), PKG-003 (Mech), PKG-004 (Elec), PKG-006 (Plumb) for penetrations, clearances, service routing. Includes signed coordination confirmation per F-002.

Description: Construction support — shop drawing review for mezzanine steel framing
Notes: Review contractor shop drawings for mezzanine steel; respond within agreed turnaround. Per X-002.

Description: Construction support — field reviews and inspection during mezzanine erection
Notes: Site reviews: embed inspection before pour, steel erection inspection, guardrail/stair final inspection, welding inspection per CSA W59 (D-002). Field review reports issued.

Description: Corrosion protection specification for wash bay zone steel framing
Notes: Specify corrosion protection (galvanizing or paint system) for all steel members in/above wash bay. Coordinate with DEL-002-12. Applicable if mezzanine extends over wash bay (CF-DS-002).

Description: Seismic design applicability determination and documentation
Notes: Determine whether seismic analysis is required for mezzanine as secondary structure within primary concrete building per ABC. Document in DEL-002-10.

Description: Fire protection applicability determination and documentation
Notes: Determine fire protection requirements for steel mezzanine framing per ABC occupancy classification. Document in drawing general notes.

Description: Building permit submission support (mezzanine portion of structural package)
Notes: Include stamped mezzanine drawings in building permit submission package per SOW-0006.
